paper.title_en: Astrophysical Population Coordinates for Supermassive Black Hole Binaries in Pulsar Timing Array Inference
paper.abstract_en: Pulsar timing arrays can probe the population physics of supermassive black-hole binaries through the nanohertz gravitational-wave background. We construct a phenomenological forward model that follows source abundance, binary residence time, the high-mass population, finite-source strain moments, and the pulsar timing response. The simulated observables constrain three standardized population coordinates: $β$, which controls the residence-time and spectral response; $φ_{eff}$, which describes source normalization after accounting for its covariance with $β$; and $m_{eff}$, which is dominated by the high-mass cutoff. In the evaluation ensemble, the posterior-mean correlations with the simulated values are $0.928$, $0.926$, and $0.884$, with central 90 per cent coverages of $0.938\pm0.015$, $0.871\pm0.021$, and $0.898\pm0.019$, respectively. Frequency-resolved observables are most important for $β$, and strain moments beyond a common-process power law provide sensitivity to the normalization and high-mass coordinates; the fourth strain moment identifies $m_{eff}$ with rare, massive binaries. These coordinates quantify the relative sensitivity of the adopted PTA summaries within this population model, for which nearby population realizations retain substantial posterior overlap.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文聚焦于脉冲星计时阵列对超大质量黑洞双星群体的推断，提出标准化坐标并评估其性能，方法严谨，结果清晰，符合PTA主题。
decision.title_zh: 脉冲星计时阵列推断中的超大质量黑洞双星天体物理坐标
decision.abstract_zh: 脉冲星计时阵列可以通过纳赫兹引力波背景探测超大质量黑洞双星的群体物理。我们构建了一个现象学前向模型，该模型跟踪源丰度、双星停留时间、高质量群体、有限应变矩和脉冲星计时响应。模拟的可观测量约束了三个标准化的群体坐标：$β$，它控制停留时间和频谱响应；$φ_{eff}$，它在考虑与$β$的协方差后描述源归一化；以及$m_{eff}$，它主要由高质量截止主导。在评估系综中，后验均值与模拟值的相关性分别为$0.928$、$0.926$和$0.884$，中心90%覆盖率为$0.938\pm0.015$、$0.871\pm0.021$和$0.898\pm0.019$。频率分辨的可观测量对$β$最为重要，而超出共同过程幂律的应变矩提供了对归一化和高质量坐标的敏感性；第四应变矩通过罕见的大质量双星识别出$m_{eff}$。这些坐标量化了所采用的PTA摘要在该群体模型中的相对灵敏度，在该模型下，邻近的群体实现保留了显著的后验重叠。
